title: legousia castellana
intro: Legousia castellana, also known as the rock bellflower, is a flowering plant species in the family Campanulaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Legousia castellana include its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues, as well as its ability to act as a diuretic and help lower blood pressure. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
